headline: 《揭秘日》登顶热搜，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: "Reveal Day" Tops Trends, New Films Poised for Release
summary: 今日娱乐热点聚焦《揭秘日》与《杀人者的购物中心》，本周《惊声尖笑6》和《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment buzz centers on "Reveal Day" and "The Killer's Shopping Mall," with "Scary Movie 6" and "Spider-Man: Freshman Year" highly anticipated this week.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，但《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将来袭。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' is coming soon.

industryHighlights.text: 《惊声尖笑6》本周热度飙升，成话题焦点。
industryHighlights.en: 'Scary Movie 6' surges in popularity this week, becoming a hot topic.

industryHighlights.text: 《后室》与《鬼谜东宫》并列本周热搜，恐怖题材持续走强。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Backrooms' and 'Ghost Mystery Eastern Palace' tie on weekly trends, horror genre remains strong.

industryHighlights.text: 韩国电影《오케이 마담 2》定档，引发影迷期待。
industryHighlights.en: Korean film 'Okay Madam 2' is scheduled, sparking fan anticipation.
